title: AES-GCM gcm_encrypt/gcm_decrypt: IV length not validated client-side
description: gcm_encrypt and gcm_decrypt accept any iv.len() and forward it to the server. The doc says 'iv must be exactly 12 bytes; other lengths will cause the server to return an error' — but the error is Ffi{code} with no message identifying the cause. A caller passing iv.len() \!= 12 gets an opaque server error instead of a clear BadArgs. Fix: add iv.len() == 12 guard at the top of both methods, returning Error::BadArgs { msg: "iv must be exactly 12 bytes" }.
